---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve and fix a broken feature.
title: '[BUG] <Short Description>'
labels: 'bug'
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error: (e.g., screen goes blank, 500 error in console)

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen instead of the bug.

## 📸 Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste the terminal/console error logs here to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment
 - **Role:** (Student, Advisor, Coordinator)
 - **Browser:** (Chrome, Safari, Firefox)
 - **Environment:** (Localhost, Staging, Production)
